target.title: fix(install): bound finalization probes
target.body:
Fixes #62509.

## Summary
- Bounds installer finalization probes that can hang, including `npm prefix -g`, `npm config get prefix`, and `openclaw daemon status --json`.
- Falls back to existing resolution paths after a timed-out probe and emits a warning instead of blocking install finalization.
- Adds focused installer-shell tests for timed npm prefix and daemon-status probes.

## Scope
- No config schema changes.
- No new public config API or plugin surface.
- No plugin behavior changes.

## Validation
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/install-sh.test.ts --reporter=dot` (1 file, 42 tests passed)
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check scripts/install.sh test/scripts/install-sh.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json test/scripts/install-sh.test.ts`
- `bash -n scripts/install.sh`
- `git diff --check`

## Real Behavior Proof
Head: `d07c09b201cfc182af72f7cc46fdb72132432599`
Environment: WSL Ubuntu, Node `v22.22.3`, isolated temporary `HOME` and `PATH`.

I ran the real `scripts/install.sh` entrypoint through the npm install and finalization stages with temp-path stubs for `npm` and `openclaw`, so the run exercised installer control flow without mutating the real global install or daemon. The `npm prefix -g` and `openclaw daemon status --json` probes intentionally slept longer than `OPENCLAW_INSTALL_PROBE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=0.2`.

Observed result:
- installer reached `[3/3] Finalizing setup`
- timed `npm prefix -g` emitted `Warning: timed out during installer finalization probe: npm prefix -g`
- timed daemon status emitted `Warning: timed out during installer finalization probe: openclaw daemon status --json`
- install still completed successfully: `OpenClaw installed successfully (openclaw proof-build)!`
- onboarding was skipped as requested, and no real daemon/global install was changed

Redacted terminal excerpt:

```text
proof_head=d07c09b201cfc182af72f7cc46fdb72132432599
node=v22.22.3
npm_stub=/tmp/openclaw-86997-proof.REDACTED/bin/npm

[1/3] Preparing environment
Node.js v22.22.3 found
Active Node.js: v22.22.3 (/tmp/openclaw-86997-proof.REDACTED/bin/node)
Active npm: unknown (/tmp/openclaw-86997-proof.REDACTED/bin/npm)

[2/3] Installing OpenClaw
Git already installed
Installing OpenClaw (proof-local)
OpenClaw npm package installed
Warning: timed out during installer finalization probe: npm prefix -g
OpenClaw installed

[3/3] Finalizing setup
Warning: timed out during installer finalization probe: npm prefix -g
Warning: timed out during installer finalization probe: openclaw daemon status --json

OpenClaw installed successfully (openclaw proof-build)!
Skipping onboard (requested); run openclaw onboard later
Warning: timed out during installer finalization probe: openclaw daemon status --json
```
target.author: giodl73-repo
